title: Add Two Promises
exampleTestcases:
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(2), 20))
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(5), 60))
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(10), 50))
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(-12), 30))
sampleTestCase:
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(2), 20))
new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(5), 60))
